title: VimFu — zt Cursor to Top
description: zt scrolls the screen so the cursor line is at the top. Useful when you want to see what comes after the current line.

setup.comment: Set TERM for proper color support in Neovim

steps.say: Z T scrolls the screen so your cursor line is at the top. Use it when you want to see everything below.

steps.comment: --- Demo 1: jump to a function, scroll to top ---

steps.say: Jump to line eighteen, the Arena class.
It's at the bottom of the screen. Z T pushes it to the top.
Now the Arena class is at the top, and all its methods are visible below.
Jump to line four, the Fighter class. Z T.
The entire Fighter class is now visible from top to bottom.
Z T. Cursor line to the top. Perfect for reading a function from its definition downward.
